label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's business strategy or platform recommendation

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of entity's long-term survival or technology platform longevity

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity or fitness for purpose

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative comparison against peers or industry standards

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework (here: Aberdeen's 5 evaluation criteria)

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic or size estimate

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of industry structure including RISC/Unix market share data

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Side-by-side comparison of DEC vs IBM vs HP against five criteria

label: Field Research
definition: Primary data collection via interviews with Hercules IS executives

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents and records including post-publication outcomes

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment based on Aberdeen's RISC/Unix market monitoring since 1990

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources
